speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main thak kar baith nahi sakta
text: Main thak kar baith nahi sakta. Aaj subah jab termination email dekha toh dimaag sunn ho gaya, par rone ka time kahan hai? Agle mahine gaon remittance bhejni hai aur bike ki EMI bhi bharni hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror their duty frame first to show their primary concern is heard.
text: Tumhara saara focus abhi is zimmedari par hai ki chahe jo ho jaaye, ghar paise bhejne aur EMI chukane ka cycle tutna nahi chahiye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main thak kar baith nahi sakta
text: Haan, papa ne kisan hokar karz lekar mujhe is shehar bheja tha. Unko main ye kaise bataun ki naukri chali gayi? Yahan metro mein waise hi akelapan khata hai, par main thak kar baith nahi sakta, ghar ki izzat ka sawal hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the implied fear of the consequence if they stop pushing.
text: Sabse bada darr ye lag raha hai ki achanak se is naukri ke jaane ki khabar se gaon mein pitaji ka karz aur parivaar ka samman khatre mein pad jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul wahi tension hai. Subah se bas yahi soch raha hoon ki ab kal se kya karunga. Mere liye breakdown ek luxury hai jo main afford nahi kar sakta. Bas ek machine ki tarah naya kaam dhoondna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question arising from their comparison of themselves to a machine.
text: Aise achanak sab kuch khud par aane ke baad, jab tum khud ko ek machine banne ke liye force kar rahe ho, toh dimaag mein sabse zyada kya chal raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main thak kar baith nahi sakta
text: Dimaag mein bas figures chal rahe hain... rent, EMI, khane ka kharcha. Mujhe apne darr ko feel karne ka waqt nahi hai. Par akele is kamre mein baith kar sach mein bohot ghabrahat hoti hai, main thak kar baith nahi sakta ye soch kar uth jata hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how their duty has left them totally isolated in the city.
text: Is badhe bojh ko uthate hue tum yahan is shehar mein bilkul akele pad gaye ho, aur kisi se apni takleef baant bhi nahi paa rahe.

speaker: Seeker
text: Batakar kya hoga? Log kahenge shehar gaya aur wahan se fail ho kar wapas aa gaya. Hamari biradari mein aise failure ka bohot mazak banta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to stigma cue with a short restatement ending in soft pause.
text: Biradari ke taano ka darr tumhe apni takleef chupane par majboor kar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: main thak kar baith nahi sakta
text: Haan bhaiya. Kai baar toh raat bhar neend nahi aati. Aankh band karte hi lagta hai sahukaar ghar pahunch gaya hai papa ke paas. Par subah uth kar fir wahi bhaag-daud. Main thak kar baith nahi sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relentless time duration of this cycle.
text: Pichle kuch dino se ya shayad mahino se, neend aur aaram ki jagah sirf is endless pressure ne le li hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach kahun toh bohot thakan hoti hai. Aisa lagta hai jaise ek loop mein phans gaya hoon jahan sirf zimmedariyan hain aur main bas ek ATM machine ban ke reh gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the core unexpressed emotion of exhaustion hidden beneath their duty.
text: Lagta hai in saari zimmedariyon ka akela bojh uthate-uthate tum ek aisi gahri EXHAUSTION mehsoos kar rahe ho jise koi aur dekh hi nahi paa raha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne sahi pakda. Andar se toot raha hoon par chehre par hamesha 'sab theek hai' wala mask pehnna padta hai. Bahut saalon ki mehnat lagti hai ek middle class ghar ko uthane mein, aur ek email ne sab mitti mein mila diya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate as culturally normal for a migrant and separate their self-worth from the job loss.
text: Ghar se door Metro shehar mein akele itna pressure jhelte hue thak jana bilkul swabhavik hai; yaad rakhna yeh company ka email sirf ek corporate decision hai, iska tumhari kabiliyat ya tumhari mehnat se koi lena-dena nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki baatein sunkar thoda halka lag raha hai. Par jab naukri nahi hoti toh har din ek saal barabar lagta hai. Pata nahi baaki migrant dost kaise manage karte hain jab unke saath aisa hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a brief systemic anecdote about migrant workers.
text: Akele rehne wale prawasi ladkon mein achanak job chhutne ka yeh pattern bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi aas-pass bolega nahi kyunki sab par ghar ki izzat bachane ka pressure hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye toh sach hai ki koi apni majboori batata nahi yahan. Abhi mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka... koi rasta hai kya ki main abhi kya karun taki thoda theek mehsoos ho aur agla step le sakun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Give actionable small steps that fit their routine without adding pressure.
text: Hum do chhote kadam le sakte hain abhi. Pehla, apne current finances aur account balance ka ek quick hisaab likh lena taki asliat saamne aaye, ya dusra, apna CV update karne ke liye sirf 10 minute nikalna bina apply kiye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dono hi theek lag rahe hain. Lekin dimaag itna thaka hua hai ki CV dekhne ka mann nahi ho raha. Finances ka hisaab lagana behtar rahega, shayad pata chale ki EMI ke liye kitna buffer bacha hai mere paas.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk them step by step through their chosen task.
text: Pehle ek copy-pen lo, apne account ka total balance likho... phir usme se is mahine ka rent aur bike EMI alag nikal do... bas itna hi calculation karna hai abhi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Maine account check kiya. Full and final settlement aur thodi savings milakar kareeb dedh mahine ka rent aur ek EMI manage ho sakti hai. Thoda sa waqt toh hai mere paas naya kaam dhundne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe their anxiety by pointing out that structural stress causes catastrophic thinking, and numbers offer clarity.
text: Aksar aarthik dabaav mein humara dimaag seedhe sabse bure nateeje par jaata hai, par in numbers ne ab ye saaf kar diya hai ki tumhare paas aaram se agle kadam ke liye kuch hafton ka thos samay hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Subah lag raha tha ki kal hi sabkuch khatam ho jayega aur sahukaar gaon mein ghar aa jayega. Thodi saans aayi hai ye jaan kar ki mere paas lagbhag 45 din hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect how quantifying the problem gave them breathing room.
text: Jab tumne paper par actual figures dekhe, tab jaakar is panic wale loop se bahar nikalne ki thodi si rahat mili hai aur ek solid time-frame dikh raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bhaiya. Par fir bhi darr lagta hai ki 45 din mein kuch nahi mila toh kya hoga. Mujhe job market ka haal pata hai, bohot kharab chal raha hai aajkal.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an execution question to keep them focused on small, immediate steps.
text: Market sach mein tough hai, lekin in 45 dino ka sahi istemaal karne ke liye, kal subah sabse pehla chhota sa kaam kya karna chahoge jo tumhe over-burden na kare?

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal subah main sirf apna resume update karunga. Apply nahi karunga, bas purane resume mein naya experience jod dunga. Usme adha ghanta lagega shayad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror their self-protection against overwhelming fear.
text: Resume ko dheere-dheere update karne ka faisla is baat ko dhyan mein rakh kar liya hai taaki failure ya rejection ka immediate darr tumhe phirse overwhelm na kar de.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ekdum sahi. Abhi mujhme himmat nahi hai rejection emails padhne ki. Pata nahi aage kya hoga, lekin aaj ki raat kam se kam chain ki neend sone ki koshish karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassure them that resting is a valid part of taking responsibility.
text: Tumhari aane waali mehnat aur job hunt ke liye yeh ek raat ki sukoon bhari neend sabse zaroori pehla kadam hai; apne aaram ko priority dena bhi ek tarah ki zimmedari nibhana hi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye tarika sochne ka accha hai. Ki agar main sounga nahi toh kal kaam kaise karunga. Pehli baar lag raha hai ki thak kar thoda baithna galat nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe on resting.
text: Muskil waqt mein jab aarthik system hi humare khilaaf ho, toh lagatar bhagte rehna hi ek option lagta hai, par thodi der ruk kar apni energy recharge karna hi is lambi race ko jeetne ka tareeka hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne mera bojh kafi halka kar diya. Subah se kisi se baat nahi ki thi iss baare mein. Gaon waalon ko toh abhi bhi nahi bataunga, par khud thoda sambhal gaya hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how sharing the burden helped reduce internal isolation.
text: Ghar walon ko sachai se door rakhne ki majboori apni jagah hai, par ab andar se tum utne akele aur bikhre hue mehsoos nahi kar rahe.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Ab pata hai ki mere paas 45 din ka plan hai. Agar zarurat padi toh main apne purane doston ko phone karunga jo dusri companies mein hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about how they will approach their support system.
text: Un purane doston se baat karte waqt, kya tum apne layoff ke bare mein khul kar bataoge ya koi aur tareeka use karoge unhe approach karne ke liye?

speaker: Seeker
text: Unse khul ke bata sakta hoon. Wo bhi shehar aaye hain aur in sab daur se guzar chuke hain. Wo judge nahi karenge jaise gaon ke log karte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final validation of their practical steps and reliance on peers.
text: Doston ke is support network ko pehchan na aur unse madat lene ka sochna, ye dikhata hai ki tum is majboori se aage badhne ke liye kitne samajhdar aur practical kadam utha rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai
text: Naukri chali gayi hai par main metro isolation mein chup-chap baitha laptop pe naye projects dhoond raha hoon taaki EMI bounce na ho. Chit fund mein Papa ke paise doobne ke baad saara bojh mere kandhon par hai, isliye thakan mein bhi mujhe 16 ghante jaagna hi hoga. Language gap ki wajah se yahan koi sunne wala nahi hai, par structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai kyunki main hi apne parivaar ki aakhri umeed hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the Seeker's duty frame of being the sole earner and carrying the family's financial burden without rest.
text: Ghar ki aakhri umeed hone ke naate, Papa ka nuksan aur EMI ka poora bojh tum akele apne kandhon par utha rahe ho, bina thake.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bhai, uthana hi padega. Bangalore mein akela pada hoon, yahan aadhi bhasha samajh nahi aati. Par gaon mein bata diya toh unki himmat toot jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of the family losing hope if they find out about the job loss.
text: Ghar walon ki himmat tootne ka darr itna zyada hai ki akele is anjaan shehar mein sab kuch khud hi seh kar unhe bacha rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai
text: Sahi baat hai. EMI bounce hone ka text jab bhi aata hai, aisa lagta hai dimaag fat jayega. Par structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai, isliye bas agla project dhoondhne mein lag jata hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probe the physical and mental toll of the pressure when facing the reality of the EMI messages.
text: Jab wo EMI bounce wala message aata hai aur dimaag par itna pressure padta hai, toh us waqt akele is room mein kaisa mehsoos hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Ghabrahat hoti hai, boss. Aisa lagta hai ki sab khatam ho jayega aur main road par aa jaunga. Par kisi se bol nahi sakta. Ek baar room mate ko bola tha toh usne bola itna weak mat ban mard hoke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to the stigma cue by normalizing the duration of holding in the fear silently.
text: Itne dino se is ghabrahat aur road par aane ke dar ko bina kisi se baante chup-chap akele jhel rahe ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Aur koi rasta bhi toh nahi hai. 16 ghante jaagna padta hai kyunki chit fund wale kabhi bhi gaon mein Papa ko pareshan kar sakte hain. Toh bas laptop par aakhein gadhaye rakhta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational motivation of sacrificing personal wellbeing to protect his father from harassment.
text: Papa ko gaon mein koi pareshan na kare, isiliye tum yahan apni neend aur aaram dono bina soche daaw par laga rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai
text: Wohi toh mera farz hai na as a sole earner. Par kabhi kabhi lagta hai ki main insaan nahi, sirf ek ATM banke reh gaya hoon. Structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai, par sach mein andar se thak gaya hoon yaar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about how he manages the dehumanizing feeling of just being an ATM while completely isolated.
text: Yeh 'ATM banke reh gaya hoon' wali feeling jab andar bahut zyada bhari ho jati hai, toh usko kaise handle karte ho akele is metro isolation mein?

speaker: Seeker
text: Handle kahan kar pata hoon. Bas bathroom mein jaa ke muh pe paani marta hoon aur wapas screen ke samne baith jata hoon. Lekin ab aakhein aur dimaag dono jawab de rahe hain. Bilkul exhausted hoon aur aur nahi khincha ja raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the underlying EXHAUSTION stemming from the C5 debt and Duty_Based coping conflict.
text: Lagta hai ki parivaar ko debt se bachane ki akele zimmedari aur yahan lagatar 16 ghante kaam karne ka pressure tumhe ab mentally aur physically puri tarah se exhaust kar chuka hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne bilkul sahi word pakda. Main andar se khatam ho raha hoon. Na naukri hai, na paise, upar se language gap ki wajah se kisi se dukh bhi nahi baant sakta yahan.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate the exhaustion as completely natural given the structural challenges of job loss, migration, and family debt.
text: Is shehar mein akele job loose karna aur upar se ghar ke karz ka akela bojh uthana, kisi ko bhi poori tarah thaka dega. Tumhara aise tootna ya exhausted feel karna bilkul natural hai, tumhari mehnat tumhari is akelepan wali halat se kahin zyada hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad natural hi hoga. Par akelepan mein har chhoti cheez ka darr lagta hai. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai main ek failure hoon jo apne bapu aur maa ko nahi sambhal pa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a systemic anecdote about migrant professionals hiding job loss out of a need to project strength.
text: Metro cities mein akele rehne wale migrant professionals mein job loss ko ghar walo se chupana bahut common hai—sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi ispe baat nahi karta kyunki sabko lagta hai ki unhe apne gaon walon ke aage hamesha kamyab dikhna hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... yehi sole earner wala tag hi gala ghoont raha hai mera aajkal. Main theek hona chahta hoon, dimaag ko thoda shant karna chahta hoon kyunki aise toh main aur bimaar pad jaunga. Batao main ab kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer 2 actionable, quick suggestions that do not add new obligations, matching the migrant/IT context.
text: Is waqt jab dimaag itna thak gaya ho, hum do chote kadam le sakte hain. Pehla, abhi 5 minute ke liye laptop band karke balcony mein khuli hawa lena. Dusra, EMI wale bank ke app mein moratorium ka option check karna jisse turant ka pressure kam ho. In dono mein se abhi konsa theek lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bank app kholne ki toh himmat nahi ho rahi abhi. Screen dekh ke hi waise hi aankh dukh rahi hai. Balcony mein 5 minute jana zyada better lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk the Seeker step by step through the balcony grounding exercise.
text: Pehle apna laptop abhi ke abhi hibernate pe daalo... phir aaram se balcony mein jaa kar sirf aati-jaati saans pe focus karo... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, main laptop band kar deta hoon abhi. Kam se kam is glowing screen se thodi der door toh rahunga. Ek thandi saans bhi le li.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize job loss as a systemic economic issue rather than a personal failure.
text: Aksar tech market mein achanak layoffs aur economy ke shifts ek bada structural pattern hai, yeh sirf tumhari koi akele ki failure nahi hai. Is poore system ke beech akele survive karna aur family ko support karna apne aap mein ek bahut badi baat hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai
text: Yeh baat sun kar thoda guilt kam hua. Sach mein aaj kal nikal rahe hain logon ko, par duty ke pressure mein mujhe lagne laga ki meri hi kaabliyat kam hai. Structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai, bas is job market ne kamar tod di.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect how he persists in his duty despite doubting himself and facing external market pressure.
text: Apni kabliyat par shaq hona aur market ki maar se thakna, is sab ke bawajood apne farz par datte rehne ki lagan, yahi tumhara sach hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Datte toh rehna padega hi. Balcony mein aake thodi hawa lagi toh dimaag ka shor thoda kam hua. Lekin Papa ki chit fund wali chinta aur EMI abhi bhi wahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask how taking action on the EMI app might impact his overarching fear regarding his father.
text: Papa ka jo wo chit fund wala darr hai, agar tum agle din bank app check karoge aur wahan se thodi rahat mil gayi, toh us darr pe kya asar padega?

speaker: Seeker
text: Agar bank app mein mujhe ek mahine ka bhi time mil gaya na EMI se, toh meri neend thodi theek ho jayegi. Main fresh dimaag se wapas job portal pe apply kar paunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how finding a small solution reduces the feared consequence of family disaster.
text: Ek mahine ki EMI chhut milne se hi aage ka rasta aur Papa ko kisi badi pareshani se bachane ka darr kaafi hadd tak shant hone lagega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Main thoda baith kar saans leta hoon aur wahi app check karta hoon. EMI bounce nahi honi chahiye, penalty aur calls dimaag kharab kar dete hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational motivation behind strictly avoiding the penalty and harassment calls.
text: Credit score bachane ki koshish ek tarah se tumhari apne parivaar ke future ko surakshit rakhne ki mehnat hi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap theek keh rahe ho. Aur mujhe option mil gaya app mein. Wo likh rahe hain ki temporarily pause ya restructure ka request daal sakte hain. Thoda documentation dena hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the relief of gaining time to plan the next steps.
text: Grace period ka option mil jana aur thodi si mohlat haasil karna, is lambe ladaai mein tumhein aage badhne ke liye thoda aur waqt dega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai
text: Sahi kahan. Kam se kam main aaj raat apne dimaag ko 6 ghante toh off kar paunga. 16 ghante ka marathon abhi ke liye rokna hi padega. Structural endurance hi meri pehchaan hai, par zinda rehna pehle zaroori hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about his execution plan for tomorrow to solidify his readiness to tackle the documentation.
text: Aaj raat aaram se 6 ghante sone ke baad, kal subah uth kar is documentation wale process ko kab aur kaise shuru karne ka plan socha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal subah breakfast ke baad pehla kaam documents upload karne ka karunga. Uske baad hi laptop par baith kar kisi dost ko reference ke liye call karunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect his structured and energized approach to reclaiming his sole earner role.
text: Subah ka aaram aur khana lene ke baad, apne is sole earner ki zimmedari ko dobara nayi energy ke sath uthane ka tumhara pakka irada saaf dikh raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Aaj shanti mili hai aap se baat karke. Warna akele is kamre mein EMI aur Papa ki sochon ne mujhe andha kar diya tha tension mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate his courage in facing family obligations while successfully creating a moment of peace for himself.
text: Parivaar ke liye is anjaan shehar ki bheed mein akele sehte rehna, aur aaj apne aap ko thodi rahat dena, tumhare aage badhne ke mazboot irade ko batata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga
text: Termination letter milte hi laga jaise saans ruk gayi, par home loan ki kist default hui toh bank wale gaon mein phone karenge aur 'log kya kahenge' ye soch kar darr lagta hai. Sharir jawab de raha hai par ek beta hone ke naate mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga taaki ghar ka chula chalta rahe. Mere paas mental health ke liye waqt nahi hai, mujhe bas apne parivaar ki 'shaan' bachane ke liye bina ruke ladte rehna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the intense duty and role expectation that forces him to suppress his immediate fear (Lens B).
text: Tumhare upar achanak aayi is financial aafat ke baad bhi, apna darr mehsoos karne ki bajaye tum khud ko ek mazboot sahara banaye rakhne ke liye majboor kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga
text: Haan, gaon me naya ghar ban raha hai aur yahan city se main EMI bhar raha hu. Agar remittance ruka toh wahan sab samajh jayenge. Mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga, warna sab zero ho jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the underlying fear of the social consequences in his village if the default happens (Lens E).
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki sabse bada khauf is baat ka hai ki bank ka phone gaon pahunchte hi wo saari bani banayi izzat ek jhatke me bikhar jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Gaon ke log yahi kahenge ki ladka shehar me fail ho gaya. Pitaji is sadme ko bardaasht nahi kar payenge. Main chahe andar se tut jau, mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga har keemat par.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompted reflection on the internal toll of strictly hiding his reality from his family.
text: Is akelepan aur darr ke sath jab tum lagatar apne ghar walo se sach chupate ho, toh wo bojh andar hi andar kaisa mehsoos hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa lagta hai jaise kisi ne saans lene ki nali daba di ho. Main sirf ek ATM machine bankar reh gaya hu. Kal termination mail dekh kar pura dimaag sunn ho gaya tha, kisi ko call nahi mila paya main.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the painful relational dynamic where he feels reduced to a mere financial provider (Lens C).
text: Ghar walo ke sath tumhara rishta sirf ek kamai ke zariye jaisa ho gaya hai, jahan tumhari apni takleef aur panic ke liye koi thikana hi nahi bacha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Unki koi galti nahi hai, unki puri duniya meri remittance se hi chalti hai. Par ab lag raha hai ki main kab tak ye bina thake khinchunga. Is natak ne mujhe bahut thaka diya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Named the deep exhaustion hiding beneath his duty-based coping mechanism now that he named the core conflict.
text: Lagta hai ek adarsh beta banne ki is koshish me, din raat parivaar ke darr ko sambhalte hue, ek bahut gehri thakaan aa chuki hai jise tumne ab tak daba ke rakha tha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach kahu toh tut chuka hu. Par apne colleagues ya dosto ko bhi nahi bata sakta. Mard hone ke naate sab expect karte hain ki main strong rahunga. Agar roya toh sab mera mazaak udayenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly mirrored the stigma and gender expectation forcing him to hide his exhaustion, ending with a pause (Lens B).
text: Apne dosto ke beech bhi ye lachari dikhana tumhare liye ek kamzori ka tana sunne jaisa darr ban gaya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, is bade shehar me koi kisi ka saga nahi hai. Room me akele baith kar bas calculation karta rehta hu ki EMI kaise niklegi. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha, sirf helplessly dekh raha hu sab dubte hue.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated his helplessness as culturally normal for migrant breadwinners and separated his worth from the job loss.
text: Bahar is bade shehar me akele pad jana aur achanak aisi job crisis aane par ye helplessness feel karna bilkul aam baat hai, aur ye mail tumhari kabiliyat ya mehnat pe koi sawal nahi uthata.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main janta hu meri mehnat me kami nahi thi, par bank wale mehnat nahi dekhte. EMI default hui toh seedha recovery agent gaon ka darwaza khatkhatayenge. Us darr ne saari raat jagaya hai mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Shared a brief systemic anecdote about migrant workers to normalize the structural reality and reduce his personal guilt.
text: Shehar aakar kamane wale aur gaon me ghar banane walo ke sath ye EMI aur sudden job loss ka bojh bohut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki sabko izzat bachani hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Chup rehna hi padta hai. Par chup reh kar bhi EMI pay toh nahi hogi. Mujhe ab sach me koi raasta nikalna hoga, aage ka kuch samajh nahi aa raha par solution toh dhoondhna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided a systemic reframe to normalize seeking temporary relief from banks without adding personal failure stigma.
text: Achanak aisi job crisis aane par, banks aur loan institutions ke paas bhi in situations ko handle karne ka procedure hota hai, ye system ka ek standard hissa hai jisme chhipane wali koi sharam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sachi? Mujhe laga ki ek bhi din EMI late hui toh turant recovery wale gaon me shor macha denge. Yahi soch soch kar dimaag fat raha tha ki notice jayega toh kya hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offered practical, low-effort options to manage the immediate loan fear without adding new obligations.
text: Agar dimaag thoda shant ho pa raha hai, toh hum do chote kadam soch sakte hain: ya toh resume me nayi chize update karne ke liye laptop khol lein, ya bank customer care ko ek simple message draft kar dein.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga
text: Bank ko pehle handle karna theek rahega. Agar thoda time mil jaye toh interviews pe focus kar paunga. Mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga chahe kuch ho, isliye aaj hi unhe message karunga. Batao customer care ka kya process karein?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Broke down the bank communication into a highly manageable, step-by-step micro-task.
text: Pehle apne phone me bank app se contact wali email id nikal lo... phir ek short do line ka message likho ki temporary problem ke karan mujhe loan extension par baat karni hai... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan ye simple hai. Ek written communication rehna better hai unke pass. Maine unki email ID copy kar li hai. Isse kam se kam wo achanak se gaon me notice nahi bhejenge bina mujhse baat kiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected how taking a small step mitigates the catastrophic fear of the village finding out (Lens E).
text: Ek chota official mail dalne se wo jo badnami ka aur gaon me shor machne ka darr tha, wo sach me bohut kam ho jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi me. Bas is mail ko bhejte hi jaise dimaag halka ho raha hai. Agar in chizo ko manage karne ka ek proper system hai toh panic karne ka fayda nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassured him that taking proactive steps despite fear is a true mark of his capability.
text: Tumhara is panic aur mushkil waqt me bhi rasta dhoondna tareef ke kabil hai, aur financial utaar-chadao me aise step lena prove karta hai ki ek bura samay tumhari mehnat aur kabiliyat nahi cheen sakta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki baaton ne himmat di hai mujhe. Mail chala gaya bank ko. Ab agla kaam hai job portals. Kal se lag jana hai wapas line me.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided another very small, specific task to maintain momentum for tomorrow without causing overwhelm.
text: Kal subah ke liye hum ek aur bohut aasan target rakh sakte hain: bas 10 minute nikal kar apne kuch bharosemand dosto ya purane colleagues ko 'looking for opportunities' ka message kar dena.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, wo main kar lunga. Achanak sab jagah panic create karne se acha hai ki pehle thande dimaag se contacts use karu. Kal subah uthte hi ye do logo ko msg kar dunga main.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighted his shift towards a more sustainable and structured timeframe for managing his tasks (Lens D).
text: Pehle pichle do din se darr darr ke raat guzarne ki bajaye, ab tum agle din ka ek ek kaam aram se plan kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga
text: Ab thoda clear dikh raha hai na rasta isliye. Par sach bolu toh parivaar ke aage mujhe pathar ban kar khade rehna hoga, unke samne main ye ghabrahat nahi la sakta kabhi bhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected how his rigid adherence to being strong has blinded him to his own basic human need for rest (Lens B).
text: Apne us 'pathar' jaisi mazboot shaan wale role me tumne maan hi liya hai ki tumhare andar ke darre hue insaan ki koi zaroorat ya awaaz hi nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach pucho toh mujhe apne aapko thoda theharne dena chahiye. Agar machine ki tarah aise hi bhaagta raha aur breakdown ho gaya, toh job hone ke baad bhi unhe remittance kon dega?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated his realization that exhaustion is normal in the context of economic distress and separated his worth from continuous grinding.
text: Bilkul sahi socha, is economic stress ke beech apni thakaan aur mental peace ka dhyan rakhna ek sacha step hai, aur khud ko aaram dena tumhari un parivaar wali responsibilities ke khilaf nahi jata.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye perspective bilkul naya hai mere liye. Main toh bas ek race me daud raha tha andha hokar. Ek tarah se acha hua ki ye halt aaya, mujhe rewind karke sochna toh mila.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe about gender expectations to normalize seeking space for oneself.
text: Aksar humari society me ghar ke bado aur mardo ko sirf unki financial kamai se evaluate kiya jata hai, isliye apne aap ko space dena thoda ajeeb lag sakta hai shuru me.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan society ka setup hi faulty hai. Koi pucha tak nahi ki tu theek hai ya nahi city me. But anyway, mujhe ab apne action plan pe dhyaan lagana hai. Rona dhona kafi ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected his shift towards a more self-compassionate relationship with his own duties and societal pressures (Lens C).
text: Ab tumne khud par laga wo saara society ka pressure thoda hata kar, apne hi bhale aur practical action plan ke sath ek healthy samajh bana li hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Aapse baat karke sach me bohut halka feel ho raha hai. Kam se kam lag raha hai ki situation utni out of hand nahi hai jitni maine dimaag me bana li thi. Bohut shukriya aapka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided final validation, reinforcing his inner strength entirely independently of his financial crisis.
text: Mujhe sach me khushi hai ki aap is halat se uth kar itni maturity dikha rahe hain, aur dhyaan rakhna, tumhara ye jo balance banane ka hosla hai wo ek termination mail se bohut upar hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: breakdown karna gunah lagta hai
text: Meri kisan identity mujhe har haal mein parivaar ka pet paalne ki hidayat deti hai. Subah email aaya kaam se nikalne ka, aur ab sahukaar ka vyaj chukane ka darr dimaag mein ghar kar gaya hai. Par main chup-chap doosri shift dhoondne nikal gaya hoon kyunki aisi halat mein breakdown karna gunah lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the Seeker's duty frame where family provision overrides immediate personal shock using Lens B.
text: Aapne apni zimmedariyon ko itna aage rakha hai ki naukri jaane ke turant baad bhi aap parivaar ki khatir koi rukaawat nahi aane dena chahte.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: breakdown karna gunah lagta hai
text: Rukne ka toh sawaal hi nahi uthta na babuji. Peeche gaon mein sab mere aashre hain. Savings wipe out ho chuki hain. Ye debt spiral itna gehra hai ki sach kahun toh thakan se choor hoon, par breakdown karna gunah lagta hai aise waqt pe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to softly name the implied fear of the family collapsing under the sahukaar's debt if they stop.
text: Yeh bojh uthate uthate aapko andar hi andar darr sata raha hai ki agar aap thoda sa bhi thehre, toh sahukaar aur udhaari ke aage sab kuch bikhar jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bikhar toh jayega hi. Vyaj ka meter har din ghoom raha hai. Din raat bas yahi udhedbun chalti hai dimaag mein. Email dekhne ke baad se bhookh pyas ud gayi hai, bas shift dhoond raha hoon. Aisa lag raha hai jaise chalte chalte hi kisi din meri saans toot jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalising the mild risk flag before using Lens D to mirror the continuous duration of their struggle.
text: Aise achanak jhatke ke baad kisi ka bhi dimaag aise hi ghoomta hai aur himmat tootne lagti hai. Pata nahi kitne dino se aap bina ruke is lagataar chalne wali thakan aur fikar ke sath akele bhaag rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: breakdown karna gunah lagta hai
text: Akela hi bhaagna padega na. Parivaar walo ko bataunga toh wo bechare darr jayenge. Biradari mein log baatein banayenge ki kaisa aadmi hai shehar jaake fail ho gaya. Isliye chup rehta hoon, breakdown karna gunah lagta hai hum mardon ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Responding to the stigma cue with a shorter Lens C restatement mirroring their relational isolation, ending with a soft pause.
text: Sabko pareshani se bachane ke liye aur logon ke taanon ke darr se, aap apna saara dard aur ghabrahat akele apne andar hi daba kar rakh rahe hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... andar hi dabana padta hai. Par sach batau, aaj himmat waqai toot rahi hai. Doosri shift nahi mili aaj aur agle hafte sahukaar ko kist deni hai. Samajh nahi aa raha kya karu. Ye duty aur karz ke beech mein meri saans ghoot rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking an open question based on their disclosure of suffocating between duty and debt, to explore the core conflict.
text: Jab aapki saans is karz aur duty ke beech aise ghootne lagti hai, toh us mushkil waqt mein aapke mann mein khud ki pehchaan ke liye kya khayal aate hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Khayal yahi aata hai ki main shayad ek ATM machine ban gaya hoon. Jisme se paise na nikle toh uski koi keemat nahi. Bas ek exhausting cycle hai jisme phas gaya hoon aur aage kuan peeche khaayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the deep unexpressed EXHAUSTION appropriate for the Duty_Based coping in a financial debt context.
text: Mujhe sunkar aisa lagta hai ki aapke andar ek bohot gehri aur bhayanak thakan—ek exhaustion—bhar chuki hai, kyunki aapko lag raha hai ki sabke liye aapki ahmiyat sirf kamaane aur udhaari chukane tak reh gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi samjhe aap. Thakan aisi hai jo sone se bhi nahi mit-ti, kyunki dimaag toh jaagta rehta hai. Ye debt spiral mujhe har waqt kachot-ta hai. Meri kisan identity ka garv kahan aur ye shehar ki dar-dar ki thokarein kahan.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating their struggle as culturally normal for migrants from farming backgrounds, separating their intrinsic worth from the job loss.
text: Shehar mein aakar apne pariwaar ki khatir dar-dar aisi thokar khana aur itna bojh akele uthana waqai bohot badi himmat ka kaam hai. Naukri ka achanak jana aapki asli kisan identity ya aapki mehnat ki keemat ko kabhi kam nahi kar sakta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne himmat bol diya par andar se toh main buri tarah dara hua hoon. Sahukaar ke log jab aate hain gaon mein, toh biradari mein izzat mitti mein mil jati hai. Yahi soch kar ajeeb si ghabrahat chaa jati hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using self-disclosure once to share a systemic anecdote about farmer debt and migration, normalizing their fear and isolation.
text: Ghar se door aakar kaam karne wale bohot se kisan parivaaron mein karz ke is jaal aur izzat ka yeh darr bohot common hai—yeh sirf aapka akele ka nateeja nahi hai, lekin koi bahar khul kar bolega nahi kyunki biradari ka darr sabko chup kara deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: breakdown karna gunah lagta hai
text: Sach hai, sab chup hi rehte hain. Aur isliye meri tarah ande hi andar ghut-te rehte hain. Kabhi lagta hai kone mein baith ke rou, par wahi baat hai, breakdown karna gunah lagta hai. Isliye main sirf chalta rehta hoon bina kisi ko bataye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring with Lens B how their strict adherence to their duty as provider actively blocks them from acknowledging their own physical and emotional pain.
text: Itna bhaari dard hone ke bawajood, ghar walo ki jaruraton aur duty ko itna aage rakh diya hai ki aap apne aasuon tak ko rok kar lagataar bas chalne ki koshish kar rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Rona dhona toh theek hai, par aansuon se vyaj nahi chukega na. Par ab sacchi mein mera dimaag kaam nahi kar raha. Kuch raasta hai kya is sunn pan se nikalne ka? Mujhe theek hona hai taki main aur jagah apply kar saku, ab kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a systemic reframe to normalize their cognitive freeze as a structural consequence of sudden layoffs and debt, not a personal flaw.
text: Yeh janna zaroori hai ki aaj kal job market aur financial systems is tarah bane hote hain ki ek email se aaye layoff mein ache se ache logon ka debt spiral ban jata hai. Yeh dimaag ka sunn hona aapki kamzori nahi, balki is aarthik bojh ka sidha bodily asar hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Baat toh aapki apni jagah paki hai. Market ki halat waise hi kharab chal rahi hai. Par sahukaar toh market ki baat nahi samjhega. Mujhe kuch chota sa upay batao ki ye jo ghabrahat mere seene mein thehar gayi hai abhi, isko halka kaise karu?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering two brief, accessible grounding suggestions that take under 10 minutes and fit within their current exhausting routine without adding burden.
text: Abhi iss ghabrahat ko thoda halka karne ke liye hum do asaan cheezein try kar sakte hain. Ya toh aap agle paanch minute ke liye apna dhyaan sirf gehri saans lene par laga lijiye, ya phir paas ki dukan se ek cup chai dheere-dheere pee lijiye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Chai wala theek lag raha hai. Saans pe dhyan dunga toh aur darr lagega ki sahukaar ki awaaz na sunai de jaye. Ek tapri hai saamne hi, wahi chalta hoon chai lene.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking them step-by-step through the execution of the chosen grounding exercise of drinking tea.
text: Bahut badiya. Pehle yeh karo ki us tapri tak aaram se chalkar jao… phir chai ko haath mein lekar uski garmahat ko mehsoos karo aur bas do ghoont piyo… bas itna hi aaj ke liye, uske alawa aage ka kuch mat socho abhi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, chai ki pyali haath mein li hai. Garmahat se sach mein thoda thehraav lag raha hai. Dimaag jo bullet train ki tarah bhaag raha tha email aane ke baad se, wo zara sa dhima hua.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the temporary pause in their continuous duration of panic and exhaustion.
text: Itne ghanton ki lagataar bhaag-daud aur fikar ke baad, aapko in do ghoont mein aakhir kaar thoda sa thehraav aur dimaag ki shanti mehsoos hone lagi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: breakdown karna gunah lagta hai
text: Sach kahun toh thodi der ruka hoon toh samajh aa raha hai ki aisi halat mein kahin naya interview deta toh waise hi reject ho jata. Shayad breakdown karna gunah lagta hai mujhe, par abhi 5 minute ka break lena mere kaam ke liye hi zaroori tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to reframe this moment of self-care not as a breakdown or failure of duty, but as a necessary step to successfully fulfill their family obligations.
text: Aapne khud pehchan liya ki thodi der ka yeh break actually aapki kisan identity aur parivaar ke dharam ko nibhane mein madad hi karega, na ki usme rukaawat banega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye thoda naya nazariya hai sochne ka. Agar main khud hi sadak par gir gaya chakkar kha ke, toh us karz ka boj kaun uthayega. Par babuji, jab tak naya kaam nahi milta, dar toh yahin rahega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the lingering, realistic fear about the future and the immediate financial consequences they are still facing.
text: Aapke mann mein yeh baat puri tarah baithi hui hai ki jab tak agle mahine ki kamai ka raasta set nahi ho jata, tab tak udhaari aur kal ka darr aapka peecha nahi chodega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Darr toh rahega hi, hum jaise logon ki kismat mein likha hai sangharsh. Par ab main us darr ke aage jhukna nahi chahta. Thoda dimaag shant hua hai toh lag raha hai kal apni pehchan walo ko factory mein phone lagaunga shift ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using the Information strategy a second time to frame networking and job-seeking as a practical, systemic approach to overcoming economic distress.
text: Hamesha yaad rakhiye ki aisi aarthik musibaton se nikalne mein thoda samay lagta hai aur isme jaan pehchan ya doston ka network istemaal karna ek bohot hi practical aur lamba chalne wala tareeqa hota hai aage badhne ka.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bas yahi karunga. Gaon walo ko toh abhi apne karz ke baare mein nahi bataunga, par kaam ke silsile mein sab doston se baat karunga shehar mein. Ye theek rahega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror their relational boundary-setting—protecting family while seeking practical help from city connections.
text: Ghar walon ki fikar badhaye bina, shehar mein naye doston aur jaan pehchan walon ke zariye aap aage ki duty poori karne ke raste nikalne ki shuruwat kar rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Sirf chup chap sehte rehna hi akele mardangi nahi hai, zarurat padne par sahi jagah baat karna bhi aana chahiye. Meri savings wipe out hui hai, par meri himmat puri bachi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirming their resilience and separating their internal courage from the external loss of savings.
text: Aapke is badlav aur dobara jutai himmat ko dekh kar bahut samman mehsoos hota hai. Paise ka nuksan hona aapki asli taqat ko nahi mita sakta, aap apne kisan jazbe ke dam par phir khade ho sakte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot shukriya aapka. Ye sab bolke man ka thoda bojh utar gaya. Abhi main wapas apne room par jaunga. Aaj raat aaram se sounga taaki kal ka din naya ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to highlight the transition from continuous exhaustion to finally allowing themselves to rest.
text: Aaj ki is bhaari thakan aur lagataar chalne ke baad, aap aakhir kaar aaram karne aur thodi shanti ke sath sone ko apna haq samajh rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: breakdown karna gunah lagta hai
text: Haan, kyunki kal phir naye sire se nikalna hai parivaar ke liye. Breakdown karna gunah lagta hai, par theek se ek raat aaram karna shayad us kaam ki taiyari hi hai. Aapki madad ke liye dil se aabhaar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B for a final time to validate that their rest is fully aligned with their deep sense of duty and farmer identity.
text: Sone ko aapne apni badi zimmedari nibhane ka ek zaroori hissa maan liya hai, taki kal poori taqat se aap parivaar ke liye apni duty poori kar sakein.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakna mere liye ek gunah hai
text: Thakna mere liye ek gunah hai kyunki mere peeche poora khandaan khada hai jo meri taraf umeed se dekhta hai. Metro city mein akele reh kar ye zillat seh raha hoon ki job chali gayi, par EMI default ka risk mujhe tootne nahi deta. Papa ki purani sarkari naukri ki pension se sabka pet nahi bharta, isliye mujhe har haal mein structural endurance dikhani hogi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the role frame (Lens B) to validate his sense of duty and responsibility towards his family above himself.
text: Aapke upar ek bahut badi family responsibility hai, aur apna job loss hone ke baad bhi aap apne baare mein sochne ke bajaye un EMI payments aur ghar walo ki safety ko priority de rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakna mere liye ek gunah hai
text: Karna hi padega. I have no other choice. Kal raat laptop khol kar baitha tha, apne emergency funds aur rent ka hisaab lagane ke liye. Samajh nahi aa raha kitne mahine yeh calculations mujhe bachayengi. Par baith nahi sakta, thakna mere liye ek gunah hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the time and duration (Lens D) of his exhausting calculation and continuous mental load.
text: Itne dino se lagatar akele aage aane wale mahino ki calculations karna aur har waqt mentally alert rehna, aapke liye ek bahut lamba aur thaka dene wala bojh ban gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut lamba bojh hai. Metro city ki life waise hi isolating hoti hai, upar se yeh achanak se layoff. Main apne office colleagues ko nahi bata sakta, sab apne apne MNC culture mein busy hain. Aur ghar par papa panic kar jayenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a question to gently explore the emotional cost of hiding his reality and experiencing daily rejection.
text: Ghar walon se yeh sach chupana aur is poore isolation mein akele uth kar daily reject hone ka darr sehna—yeh sab aapko andar se kaisa mehsoos kara raha hai is waqt?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakna mere liye ek gunah hai
text: Ekdum blank lagta hai sab kuch. Jab bhi phone par bank ka woh automated EMI reminder pop up hota hai, ek second ke liye saans hi ruk jaati hai. Phir khud ko force karta hoon wapas track pe aane ke liye kyunki thakna mere liye ek gunah hai bhai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the feared consequence (Lens E) of what might happen to the family if he defaults.
text: Woh reminder dekh kar achanak se darr lagna, jaise agar kisi wajah se us mahine ka default ho gaya toh aage chal kar aapke khandaan ka kya haal hoga, yeh khayal dara deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi darr hai. Agar default ho gaya toh society mein kya izzat reh jayegi? Papa ne saari life mehnat karke naam banaya, meri ek fail ki wajah se unka poora naam kharab ho jayega aur log taane marenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational element (Lens C) to gently acknowledge his fear of tarnishing his father's reputation, respecting the stigma cue.
text: Aap apni family ke naam ko kisi bhi haal mein aanch nahi aane dena chahte...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main kisi bhi keemat par unhe girne nahi de sakta. Par honestly bolu? Main andar se thak gaya hoon. Bahar se main wahi confident IT guy ki act kar raha hoon, par sach mein I am completely drained out. Aajkal job portals kholte hi stress hone lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the unexpressed exhaustion hidden beneath his role as the family's shield.
text: Lagta hai ek taraf dhaal ban kar apne khandaan ko bachane ki duty hai, aur doosri taraf andar hi andar itni badi exhaustion hai jise aap kisi ko dikha nahi sakte.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly yahi hai woh baat. Corporate world mein you are just a resource, kal unka target pura nahi hua aur aaj aapka access cut. Aur yahan hum akele PG aur flats mein baith kar un EMIs ka poora bojh akele uthate hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating his hidden exhaustion as culturally normal for metro IT breadwinners while separating his worth from the layoff.
text: Yeh jo akele chhup kar thakan aur isolation feel karna hai is metro city mein, yeh bilkul aam baat hai. Yahan IT professionals aksar apna struggle family se chupate hain. Par ek corporate ka decision aapki kabiliyat ya aapki asli worth ko kam nahi kar deta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. Aaj pehli baar yeh sunkar thoda halka lag raha hai. I always felt like agar maine apne career mein fail kiya toh main as a son bhi fail ho gaya. Par sach mein dekha jaye toh market hi unpredictable hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a brief systemic anecdote to normalize hiding corporate distress due to the pressure to appear successful.
text: Corporate duniya mein aise layoffs ke baad akele akele stress jhelna bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki sabko society ke aage ek successful professional image maintain karni hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, hum sab ek jhoothi image leke ghoomte hain. Par ab lag raha hai mujhe practically sochna padega. Is takleef ko pakad kar baithne se aage ka rent pay nahi hoga na. Dimag chalana hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring his role frame (Lens B) as he shifts from feeling overwhelmed back to a practical provider mindset.
text: Ab aap us takleef se thoda bahar nikal kar wapas apne us provider wale mindset mein aana chah rahe hain, taaki aage ke raaste ko safely tay kar sakein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par problem yeh hai ki mind abhi focus nahi kar pa raha. 100 jagah apply karne ka socha tha, par kahan se shuru karoon aur kitne rejections jhelu? Mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha, koi chota sa clear raasta hai kya aage ka?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering two short, low-effort suggestions that match his analytical mindset without adding emotional weight.
text: Do aisi choti cheezein try kar sakte hain jinme shayad sirf 10 minute lagenge. Pehla, ek notebook lekar aane wale ek mahine ke fixed kharcho ka rough amount likh lijiye. Ya doosra, apna resume sirf ek baar padh kar review kariye, bina kisi company ko apply kiye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Resume abhi nahi dekha jayega mujhse, bohot stress hota hai usko lekar. Par budget likhne wala option theek lag raha hai. Ek baar fixed expenses saamne honge toh kam se kam clearly dikhega ki mera cash kitne waqt tak stretch ho sakta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Executing the budget suggestion step-by-step to help him regain a sense of control immediately.
text: Pehle ek blank paper aur pen uthayiye... phir us par agle ek mahine ka sabse zaroori kharcha aur EMI ka exact amount rough mein likhiye... bas itna hi aaj ke liye, aur aage ka nahi sochna hai abhi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai. Pen aur paper se hi karunga pehle, Excel baad mein. Jab numbers literally paper par saamne honge toh mere dimaag mein jo continuously calculations chal rahi hain, woh thodi shant hongi shayad.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duration aspect (Lens D) to emphasize how this small step gives him mental clarity for the coming month.
text: Is ek chote action se aapka aage aane wala poora mahina paper par clear ho jayega, jisse aapko har waqt mentally un numbers ka hisaab lagane ki thakan nahi uthani padegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Bas ek cheez aur dimaag kha rahi hai meri. Sister ki next semester ki fees bhi agle mahine jani hai. Papa ne kal hi call par has ke bola tha 'tu hai metro mein kama raha, mujhe fees ki tension nahi'.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational tension (Lens C) between feeling loved by his father and pressured by the expectations.
text: Papa ka aap par itna bada bharosa dekh kar, ek taraf toh pyar mehsoos hota hoga, par dusri taraf ab us extra fees ko akela arrange karne ka pressure bhi mehsoos ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: It's suffocating honestly. Main kisi ko hurt nahi karna chahta, par kabhi kabhi lagta hai car le jakar kahin door nikal jaun jahan kisi ki responsibility na ho, aur waapas hi na aaun. Par phir un sab ke chehre yaad aate hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a warm normalizing line before mirroring the feared consequence (Lens E) to gently address the mild risk of escape.
text: Aisa exhausted mehsoos karna normal hai jab insaan akele itna jhelta hai. Aapko andar se darr lagta hai ki agar aap aise ruk gaye ya chhod diya, toh un sabka kya hoga jo puri tarah se aapke bharose baithe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Nahi, main kahin door jaunga nahi. Itni saalon ki mehnat aise hi throw away thodi kar dunga. Bas itni expectations se thodi ghutan ho rahi thi. I just needed to say it out loud. Ab focus karke is fees ka solution dhundh lunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the situation to normalize his isolation and layoffs as structural macroeconomic issues, not personal failings.
text: Aap jaise IT professionals jab achanak bench par aate hain, toh akelepan mein expectations ka pressure jhelna system ka ek bahut bada issue hai. Yeh layoffs macroeconomic cycles ka hissa hote hain, iska matlab yeh nahi ki aap as a provider fail ho gaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeah, it is just a bad phase in the tech market. Mujhe apna ek chota sa mutual fund break karna padega shayad fees ke liye. I guess emergencies ke liye hi toh rakhte hain hum yeh sab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the role frame (Lens B) as he decisively plans to use his savings to fulfill his brotherly duty.
text: Apni savings ko sister ki padhai ki zarurat ke liye use karke, aap as an elder brother us zimmedari ko practically poora karne ka tay kar rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Kal morning main pehle budget paper par likhunga, then us fund ko redeem karunga. Ek din mein bas ek hi task. Dheere dheere aage badhunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the duration frame (Lens D) to validate his structured, one-step-at-a-time approach to the future.
text: Is hisaab se waqt ko chhote hisso mein tod kar aur sirf ek din ka task focus karne se, aapne aane wale kal ka ek bohot achievable plan bana liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Achievable lag raha hai. Par papa ko bhi halka sa hint dena padega regarding market. 'Sab perfect hai' wali jhoothi guarantee ab aur maintain nahi ho payegi mujhse.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational strategy (Lens C) of setting boundaries with his father to reduce his isolation safely.
text: Apne pita ko dheere dheere market ki reality ka hint dekar, aap unhe completely andhere mein rakhne ka apna woh isolating pressure kam karna chah rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, I will just tell him ki tech sector mein abhi thoda slowdown hai so expenses maintain karke chalne honge. Papa samjhdar hain, woh bhi sarkari naukri lagne se pehle structure aur struggle dekh chuke hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating his transition from isolated endurance to practical, shared problem-solving as a highly capable step.
text: Aapne apni himmat dikha kar us panic se bahar aane ka raasta tay kiya hai, aur apne father ko is conversation mein shamil karne ka decision wakai ek mature provider ki tarah ek strong kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. Main abhi paper lekar budget banane baith raha hoon. Numbness chali gayi hai ab, aur mujhe mera agla clear step pata hai. Baat karne se dimag ki bheed clear ho gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the role frame (Lens B) to emphasize his regained focus on financial priorities and practical action.
text: Apne priorities ko saamne rakh kar ground level ke action lene se, aapne na sirf family ki suraksha plan kar li hai balki apna dimaagi balance bhi wapas haasil kar liya hai.
